title: Qurius
description: The mod that adds the most curious items.
body:
Adds a bunch of strange odds and ends to the game! Lots of features are planned, but very few are implemented at the moment. 
***
_For the moment, things will remain buggy and in the alpha stage. Please remain patient while the development of this mod continues. For any bugs you find, problems you encounter, or suggestions, please use the issue tracker [https://github.com/RohanBhattacharyya/Qurius/issues](https://github.com/RohanBhattacharyya/Qurius/issues)_
***
## Features
- End Game Ingot (Kill the ender dragon for one ingot, it's a drop!)

- End Game Armor


![END_CHESTPLATE](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2e83c181f5479be90622c4732e80c5988fb93890.png)
- End Game Tools

![END_AXE](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cd62fc3afb9e6e2e3f33139837a21511e1725cc7.png)
- Strange food 

![CHEEZE_WIZ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ef09bc993cac7e25f5431421d292484410ec3b42.png)
- Much more! (planned)

***
### Misc
You can add this to any modpack.
***
